portals.name: User Dashboard
portals.description: Client-facing wellness hub with journal, mood, goals, quiz history, saved therapists

portals.name: Therapist Dashboard
portals.description: Practice management with schedule, client roster, session notes, inquiries

portals.name: Organization Portal
portals.description: Org admin with seat management, analytics, messaging, compliance, SSO, calendar

portals.name: Admin Portal
portals.description: Platform administration with 15+ tabs: users, CMS, feature flags, compliance, billing, directory, analytics, quizzes, AI research

portals.name: Coach AI
portals.description: AI-powered wellness coaching with crisis detection (19 keywords, 4 crisis resources)

portals.name: DevTools Panel
portals.description: Developer tools with seed data, changelog, org tree, UAT management

portals.name: Ops Report
portals.description: Product strategy report and operational documentation

integrations.name: Stripe
integrations.details: stripity_stripe ~> 3.2, checkout sessions, webhook handler with signature verification

integrations.name: PayPal
integrations.details: Orders API v2 via Req, OAuth token exchange, PAYMENT.CAPTURE webhook

integrations.name: Swoosh/SendGrid
integrations.details: Transactional email, org invitations, UAT feedback, production SendGrid adapter

integrations.name: Anthropic/Claude
integrations.details: AI provider for Coach AI wellness conversations, therapist matching intelligence

integrations.name: SerpAPI
integrations.details: Practitioner profile enrichment, directory detection pipeline, photo extraction

integrations.name: OpenStreetMap Nominatim
integrations.details: Reverse geocoding for Near Me search functionality (client-side)

integrations.name: Web Speech API
integrations.details: Voice search on homepage (client-side browser API)

integrations.name: Azure Container Apps
integrations.details: Production hosting with ACR image registry, migration jobs

integrations.name: Plane PM
integrations.details: Issue tracking, UAT submission sync, automated issue creation/resolution

genservers.purpose: Polls for UAT submissions, syncs to Plane PM, auto-resolves

features: Therapist directory with search, filters, and profile pages
Therapy Connect swipe matching with spring physics, super like, undo
Coach AI wellness chatbot with crisis detection (19 keywords, 4 resources)
10 validated mental health assessment quizzes (PHQ-9, GAD-7, PSS-10, etc.)
Quiz > Match funnel gating (directory access requires quiz completion)
PERMA-V analytics engine with radar charts
User dashboard with journal, mood logging, goals, saved therapists
Therapist dashboard with schedule, client roster, session notes
Organization portal with seat management, analytics, SSO, compliance
Admin portal with 15+ management tabs
Real-time messaging (PubSub) between therapists and users
Stripe + PayPal dual payment processing with webhooks
2FA/TOTP enrollment with QR codes and backup codes
RBAC with admin-only live session guard
Feature flags with conditional rules, rollout %, role/plan targeting
CMS pages with TipTap WYSIWYG editor
Quiz builder with drag-and-drop question ordering
Quiz JSON import (drag-drop uploader)
Subscription billing with tier-based feature gates
Compliance audits and findings tracking (HIPAA)
Notification tray with PubSub real-time updates
Organization invitation system (token-based email flow)
Voice search via Web Speech API
Near Me geolocation via Nominatim reverse geocoding
Advanced search with autocomplete and filter chips
AI practitioner research (SerpAPI enrichment + directory detection)
Profile view toggle (Standard vs AI Enhanced)
Neobrutalist Therapy Connect card design
Lottie animations (welcome, success, loading)
Visual style guide at /style-guide with design tokens
UAT testing framework with test cases, bug reports, user stories, OTP auth
UAT submission syncer (GenServer daemon, Plane PM integration)
Dev tools widget with changelog, seed inspector, org tree
Ops report page for product strategy
Crisis support page with emergency resources
Blog, How It Works, Pricing pages
Demo mode with is_demo flag filtering
Glassmorphism CSS utilities
Responsive navbar with mobile hamburger menu
Showcase modal with localStorage dismissal

deployment.ci_cd: GitHub Actions (build -> migrate -> deploy -> health check)
